title: Navidrome Segment 07
summary: Later development segment focused on stability and maintenance: TAK audio format support, MPV jukebox playback improvements (Windows support, command templates, socket naming), ginkgo v2 test runner migration with structured lyrics, playlist response field fixes, legacy null handling in database, reverse proxy real-IP support, album release date in responses, Unix socket permissions, collapsible playlist comments in UI, and a large wave of Go dependency upgrades (chi router, jwx, goose migrations, gomega, toml v2, prometheus, protobuf, viper, x/net, x/sync, etc.).
instructionPreview: `/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.
instruction:
You are an autonomous engineer. The repository at /workspace is at an earlier state of a real-world project.

`/workspace/requirements/` contains every requirement as a separate file. Each file describes one change request. Read them all, implement every one. Order does not matter, but some changes depend on others.

moduleDag.description: Later development segment focused on stability and maintenance: TAK audio format support, MPV jukebox playback improvements (Windows support, command templates, socket naming), ginkgo v2 test runner migration with structured lyrics, playlist response field fixes, legacy null handling in database, reverse proxy real-IP support, album release date in responses, Unix socket permissions, collapsible playlist comments in UI, and a large wave of Go dependency upgrades (chi router, jwx, goose migrations, gomega, toml v2, prometheus, protobuf, viper, x/net, x/sync, etc.).

nodes.label: Database & Migrations
nodes.description: Schema migrations for null column defaults, scrobble buffer ID, lyric column alteration, album paths, path separators, and image file separators. Touched by PRs for legacy null handling (2840), comment typo/scrobble (2974), ginkgo v2 upgrade (2793), and shared temp file helper (2863).

nodes.label: Domain Models
nodes.description: Domain model updates for lyrics structured type, media file with new fields, genre, artwork ID, file types (TAK), album/artist with default values, playlist, share, scrobble buffer with ID, and criteria operators. Touched by PRs for TAK support (2745), ginkgo v2 (2793), legacy nulls (2840), and playlist fields (2818).

nodes.label: Media Scanner
nodes.description: Tag scanning with taglib wrapper updates (TAK support, structured lyrics parsing), metadata improvements, rescanall with Go 1.20 support, cached genre repository, and refresher fixes. Touched by PRs for TAK (2745), ginkgo v2 (2793), shared temp file (2863), playlist fields (2818), and go-node toolchain (2861).

nodes.label: Core Business Logic
nodes.description: Core services including MPV playback (track management, socket naming for Windows, command templates, close helpers), ffmpeg transcoding, artwork cache warmer and resized reader, external metadata, share, agents, archiver, and playlists. Touched by PRs for MPV Windows (2774), MPV command template (2948), TAK (2745), shared temp file (2863), and playback comments (2949).

nodes.label: Subsonic API Layer
nodes.description: Subsonic REST API with structured lyrics (OpenSubsonic), album release date in responses, response snapshot updates for ginkgo v2, helpers refactoring, searching improvements, browsing, media retrieval, radio, sharing, and stream. Touched by PRs for album release date (2906), ginkgo test runner (2926), ginkgo v2 (2793), TAK (2745), comment typo (2974), and reverse proxy (2858).

nodes.label: React UI Frontend
nodes.description: React frontend with collapsible comment component for playlists and albums, rating field null fix, add-to-playlist dialog fix, LastFM scrobble toggle, auth provider updates, theme adjustments (ligera, nord, spotify), and player reducer. Touched by PRs for playlist comment collapse (2973), null rating (2824), MPV Windows (2774), and jest-dom/prettier upgrades.

nodes.label: Server Infrastructure
nodes.description: HTTP server with reverse proxy real-IP middleware, Unix socket permissions, auth improvements, serve_index updates, public stream handling for TAK, middleware fixes, and initial setup changes. Touched by PRs for reverse proxy (2858), Unix socket (2763), TAK (2745), and go-node toolchain (2861).

nodes.label: Go Dependencies
nodes.description: Go module dependency management including chi router v5, jwx library and patch upgrades, goose migrations, ginkgo v2, gomega 1.33, toml v2 and patches, prometheus client, protobuf runtime, viper refresh, x/net 0.23, x/sync, image library, sync library, and secure middleware upgrades.

nodes.label: Utility Libraries
nodes.description: Shared utilities including cached HTTP client, file helpers, gravatar, number utils, merge_fs, singleton, and gg (generic getters for null handling). Touched by PRs for legacy nulls (2840), shared temp file (2863), and playlist fields (2818).

nodes.label: CLI Commands
nodes.description: CLI entry points with Unix socket config, wire injection updates, and inspect command for ffmpeg. Touched by PRs for Unix socket (2763), shared temp file (2863), and ginkgo v2 (2793).

nodes.label: Persistence Layer
nodes.description: Repository implementations with playlist repository fixes (refreshcounters comment, response fields), radio repository, playlist track repository, scrobble buffer with ID, and base repository improvements. Touched by PRs for playlist fields (2818), refreshcounters (2947), comment typo (2974), and gomega (2968).

nodes.label: Configuration & Constants
nodes.description: Application configuration for Unix socket permissions, MPV command template, TAK mime types, and logging formatters. Touched by PRs for Unix socket (2763), TAK (2745), MPV template (2948), and shared temp file (2863).
